events.payload:
**Arc**: Cowork session support has just been implemented in the synthesizer (prompt edits done, T49-T80) and verified end-to-end via a headless CLI run that produced `synthesized 1 entries` with `agent_backend: cowork` (T114-T126). The AI is now summarising the verification outcome and laying out a recommended test procedure using the Electron desktop host.

**Before**: The AI had described a two-step procedure the user was expected to execute independently: open a new terminal, `cd` into the AgentProduction directory, run `claude --plugin-dir ...`, then issue two slash commands inside Claude Code. The path was presented as a single, unambiguous instruction set — no branch point, no question, no uncertainty about which direction to take.

**Event (preceding AI turn — verbatim)**: "两个都在默认 14 天发现窗口内（今天 05-20）。**推荐用 `AgentProduction`** —— 最近、单会话、内容是一段实打实的产品思考,适合验证 synthesizer 能不能产出有质量的 entry。

## 测试步骤（在一个新终端里）

```bash
cd "/Users/pandazki/Documents/Claude/Projects/AgentProduction"
claude --plugin-dir /Users/pandazki/Codes/tanka-work-memory-plugin/work-memory-claude-plugin
```

进 Claude Code 后依次：

```
/work-memory:work-log-init     # 把这个 Cowork 目录注册成 work-memory 项目（交互式,project_id/语言）
/work-memory:work-log          # 触发 synthesizer —— 应扫到对应 Cowork 会话并产出 entry
```"

**Event (user direction — verbatim)**: "你直接启动客户端吧"

**Event classification**: user-initiated-pivot

**After — concrete artifacts**: The AI pivoted to launching the Electron desktop host: T129 read `electron-example/README.md`; T133 ran `npm run build` in `electron-example/`; T136 launched `./node_modules/.bin/electron .` as a background task (task ID `b2iokutfn`); T138-T139 confirmed the Electron app started, logging session start and `http://127.0.0.1:8788` preview server up.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (1) T102 contained no direct question, no ≥2 named options, and no flagged uncertainty — it was reporting verification results and narrating a user-executed test procedure as a single recommended path. (2) The user's message introduced a new directive: instead of following the steps independently, the user directed the AI to launch the client itself. (3) Within the next 10 turns (T104-T136), work demonstrably shifted to building and launching the Electron app, exactly what the user directed.
